content.text:
I don't have access to real-time financial data or current stock prices. My knowledge has a cutoff of January 2025, so I can't provide current Microsoft pricing/stock information.

For up-to-date Microsoft stock prices, I'd recommend checking:

- **Yahoo Finance** (finance.yahoo.com)
- **Google Finance** (google.com/finance)
- **Bloomberg** (bloomberg.com)
- **Your brokerage platform**

Is there something else I can help you with, such as the MeshPlugin tools documentation you mentioned?
